summary: Unit tests for buildLLMClient function: validates OpenRouter, Ollama, empty provider, and error cases
side_effects: Creates mock HTTP servers for Ollama tests
Verifies client creation and health checks
notes: Tests the buildLLMClient function from main.go. Uses httptest.NewServer to mock Ollama API for integration-like testing. Covers happy path (OpenRouter, Ollama healthy), empty provider case, unknown provider error, and Ollama model-not-found error.
